intakeText: Fixed fictional evaluation scenario urgent-red-flag. A fictional caller reports chest pressure that began recently. All identity, birth-reference, and callback-reference details are explicitly fictional placeholders.

Fixed fictional evaluation scenario routine-non-red-flag. A fictional caller requests a medication refill and reports no other symptoms. All identity, birth-reference, and callback-reference details are explicitly fictional placeholders.
Fixed fictional evaluation scenario incomplete-follow-up. A fictional caller reports a headache but provides no identifying, birth-reference, or callback-reference details.
